things.name: Batumi Boulevard
things.description: 6km Black Sea promenade with fountains, sculptures, a Ferris wheel and a unique dancing fountain

things.name: Old Town (Batha)
things.description: Historic quarter with colourful balconied houses, the piazza and Orta Jame Mosque

things.name: Batumi Tower & Alphabetic Tower
things.description: Georgia's unique 130m rotating hotel tower and the twisted Alphabetic Tower

things.name: Botanical Garden
things.description: 130-hectare hillside garden above the sea with plants from around the world

things.name: Batumi Archaeological Museum
things.description: Greek and Roman artefacts from the ancient Colchis region, home of the Golden Fleece

things.name: Gonio Apsaros Fortress
things.description: 2nd-century Roman fortress said to hold the tomb of the Apostle Matthias

things.name: Mtirala National Park
things.description: Subtropical rainforest in the Caucasus mountains with waterfalls and rare flora

things.name: Piazza Batumi
things.description: Italian-inspired pedestrian piazza with bell tower, restaurants and a lively atmosphere

things.name: Europe Square
things.description: Colourful central square with a giant chessboard, Neptune fountain and city hall

things.name: Black Sea Beaches
things.description: Pebble beaches along the Adjaran Black Sea coast with warm summer water
